constitution.article_i_cli_first: PASS - validation performed through CLI artifacts; no UI-first execution required
constitution.article_ii_agent_authority: PASS - story draft validation performed by @po authority
constitution.article_iii_story_driven: PASS - target story exists in docs/stories and remains Draft
constitution.article_iv_no_invention: BLOCK - story is not self-contained enough; implementation would require extracting many unstated contracts from external tasklists
constitution.article_v_quality_first: BLOCK - quality gates not run because draft validation blocked before implementation readiness

notes: Community Origin optional section is absent, acceptable for internal story.
Dev Agent Record sections were present with TBD placeholders, expected before implementation.
CodeRabbit skip notice is present and matches disabled/not configured core-config state.
executor and quality_gate are present and different.
Both agents are valid under validate-next-story executor assignment rules.
For code/features/logic work, @dev with @architect quality gate is valid.

issues: Scope combines visual design, DA model expansion, UI components, API routes, database, BullMQ workers, pgvector, SSE, ZIP packaging, FBR-Social handoff, human intervention, and full test coverage in one increment.
Concrete schemas, endpoints, files, event contracts, queue behavior, storage paths, retry rules, environment variables, and dependency order are not summarized in the story.
References point mostly to whole documents instead of exact sections/tasks.
Developer must read the full VideoFlow PRD/SPEC/tasklist to implement safely.
Acceptance criteria are too broad to verify without external decomposition.
Test files, fixtures, mocks, and validation steps are not mapped to specific acceptance criteria or source tasks.

blocking_issues: Story scope is too large; source docs already separate this into VF-V01..VF-V09, VF-D01..VF-D02, VF-C01..VF-C05, VF-A01, and TASK-VF01..TASK-VF18 across four sprints.
Dev Notes are not self-contained enough to satisfy Article IV for implementation.

File locations are broad path groups and include paths that do not match the current repo tree; current app root is apps/portal, while the story lists apps/modules/videoflow and backend/api/videoflow.
Acceptance criteria require matching the full PRD_SPEC_TASKLIST and broad test classes without embedding the specific pass/fail conditions.
should_fix_issues: Split or narrow the story into implementable increments following source dependency order.
Map each acceptance criterion to exact source tasks and verification steps.

Summarize the DA vector schema, Handoff envelope rules, database/RLS schema, API contracts, SSE event format, BullMQ queue behavior, FBR-Social payload/auth, storage paths, rate limits, retry rules, and environment variables.
Replace broad production paths with repo-aligned paths under apps/portal/src or explicitly document the intended module layout before development.
next_action: Return to @sm *draft or @pm to split/refine the story and add self-contained implementation detail. Keep status as Draft until the revised story reaches GO score >= 7/10.
